mdSummary:
# Container

Responsive max-width wrapper with consistent page padding.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/container

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Container | MaxWidth | `string?` | `"lg"` |  |
| Container | Center | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Container | Padding | `string?` | `"4"` |  |
| Container | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Container | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Container | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Container) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

- (none)

- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard

## Example

```razor
<Container />
```
